title: PMM cards conditional rendering — distinguish 'not registered' from 'broken'
candidateRelease: v0.4.1 (Option A only) OR v0.5 (Options A + B together)
openQuestions: Q1 — Distinguish 'instance not registered in PMM' from 'PMM exporter for that engine is down'? Probably needs a PMM service-list lookup before deciding which message to render.

Q2 — Auto-register UX: per-engine PMM agent credentials reuse the password we manage, OR ask the operator? PMM agent typically needs PROCESS / REPLICATION CLIENT privs which the root account already has.
